betterquesting:10.desc:8:
§6Arc Welder§f

§aWeld metal plates into industrial-grade components.§f

The §bArc Welder§f is an important machine needed for building welded plates and other key machinery. It uses electricity and welding fluids to fuse metal plates together.

§6Crafting§f:
Made at a §bSteel (Tier 2) Anvil§f:
§b• 4× Cast Steel Plates§f
§b• 8× Tungsten Ingots§f
§b• 1× 10k-20Hz Transformer§f
§b• 2× Graphite Electrodes§f

§6Operation§f:
The arc welder has three item slots (color-coded red, yellow, green) corresponding to its ports, plus one fluid slot. Recipes consume power (HE/t) and time (ticks).

§eTip§f: Welded plates are essential for building advanced generators and power infrastructure. Build this machine early in the electrical age.
